SEC-ARCH-001.name: HTTPS Usage
SEC-ARCH-001.description: Site uses HTTPS for secure communication
SEC-ARCH-001.impact: Data transmitted in cleartext can be intercepted

SEC-HEAD-001.name: Strict-Transport-Security
SEC-HEAD-001.description: HSTS header is present and valid

SEC-HEAD-002.name: Content-Security-Policy
SEC-HEAD-002.description: CSP header is present to prevent XSS
SEC-HEAD-002.impact: Site vulnerable to Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) attacks
